title: Quantitative & Qualitative Dataset
author: Firdaus, Aimee Naila Firdaus
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset was generated as part of a mixed-methods study investigating the role of artificial intelligence in supporting quality education and personalized learning. The dataset consists of both quantitative and qualitative data collected through surveys and open-ended responses from participants. Quantitative data were used to identify patterns and trends related to participants’ perceptions and experiences, while qualitative data provided deeper insights into the findings. All data have been anonymized prior to publication to protect participants’ privacy and confidentiality. The dataset is shared to promote transparency, reproducibility, and further research in the fields of educational technology, artificial intelligence, and Sustainable Development Goal 4 (Quality Education).
